purpose: To introduce HubSpot's AI product, Breeze, showcase its features and benefits across various business functions, establish trust through security and customer success, and drive user engagement towards trying or purchasing the solution.
importantSections: Hero and Introduction to Breeze AI
HubSpot Plan Pricing with AI Features
summary: This page is a comprehensive product landing page for HubSpot's AI offering, Breeze, designed to enhance marketing, sales, and customer service. It details various AI agents, emphasizes enterprise-grade security and transparency, and provides pricing information across different HubSpot plans. The page aims to demonstrate how Breeze can help businesses grow by leveraging AI built on their customer data.
